summary: Tested Menu page Quick Actions redesign, Profile & AI section move to My Account, and Showcase page mobile overflow fix. All features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quick Actions system tested on Menu page. Edit button toggles panel showing 18 actions with tap-to-select UI. Default Quick Actions: share_review, send_card, ask_jessi, showcase, leaderboard, my_activity. Profile & AI section (My Digital Card, My Link Page, AI Persona, Voice Training) moved from Menu to My Account page. Showcase mobile overflow fixed with flexWrap on quickLinksRow.

menu_quick_actions_section.test: QUICK ACTIONS section visible with 6 default tiles
menu_quick_actions_section.details: Section title 'QUICK ACTIONS' visible. Default tiles: Share Review, Send Card, Ask Jessi, Showcase, Leaderboard, My Activity

edit_button_and_panel.details: Edit button changes to 'Done' when clicked. Edit panel shows instruction text 'Tap to add or remove. Max 6 Quick Actions.' All 18 action items displayed with numbered badges on selected items.

edit_panel_actions.test: 18 action items available in edit panel
edit_panel_actions.details: Selected (6): Share Review, Send Card, Ask Jessi, Showcase, Leaderboard, My Activity. Unselected (12): Tasks, Dialer, Team Chat, SMS Campaigns, Email Campaigns, Broadcast, Birthday, Analytics, Training, Templates, Link Page, My Rankings

profile_ai_not_on_menu.test: Profile & AI items NOT on Menu page
profile_ai_not_on_menu.details: My Digital Card, My Link Page, AI Persona, Voice Training are not visible on Menu page

profile_ai_on_my_account.test: Profile & AI section on My Account page
profile_ai_on_my_account.details: Section title 'PROFILE & AI' visible. All 4 items present with correct styling: My Digital Card (Bio, socials & preview), My Link Page (Linktree-style page for socials), AI Persona (Communication style), Voice Training (Train AI with your voice)

showcase_mobile_overflow.test: Showcase page quick links wrap on mobile
showcase_mobile_overflow.details: 375px viewport: scrollWidth equals docWidth (no overflow). All quick link buttons (My Card, Store, Share, QR) visible and properly wrapped
